faq.aboutPlatform.whatIsMyTourAnswer: MyTour is a product of DINNO CJSC, a subsidiary of Ameriabank. MyTour is a travel platform where offers from the market's leading tour operators are presented, and users can make online bookings within minutes without visiting a travel agency.
faq.aboutPlatform.howToUseAnswer: MyTour is available within Ameriabank's MyAmeria app (accessible only to Ameriabank customers) and as a standalone website — mytour.am — available to everyone.
faq.aboutPlatform.whoToContact: Who to contact for booking issues
faq.aboutPlatform.whoToContactAnswer: For any issues related to packages booked through MyTour, please contact the MyTour support team at 033 320050.
faq.aboutPlatform.hasOfficeAnswer: Yes, the MyTour office is located at 2/1 Argishti St., but there is no need to visit the office for bookings — all bookings are completed online.
faq.bookings.destinationsAnswer: Currently, the platform offers full packages to Egypt, as well as hotel options in the UAE, Cyprus, and the Maldives. The list of destinations is constantly expanding, and more countries will soon be available on MyTour.
faq.bookings.realPrices: Are the prices real and final?
faq.bookings.realPricesAnswer: Yes, all prices presented on the platform are valid at the time of booking and do not include any additional charges.
faq.bookings.priceChangesAnswer: Prices are fixed at the moment of booking. Only the unpaid portion of the package may change due to currency exchange fluctuations — becoming either higher or lower.
faq.bookings.recalculationSpeed: How fast can I get a quote for a modified package (dates, number of travelers, room type)?
faq.bookings.recalculationSpeedAnswer: Recalculations are done in real time. By editing the required parameters, users can instantly see the updated price.
faq.bookings.confirmationTime: How long does it take to confirm a booking?
faq.bookings.confirmationTimeAnswer: Usually, confirmation is received within one business day. However, during high-demand seasons, it may take up to three business days. If a booking is not confirmed, the payment is refunded to the user.
faq.bookings.hotelRequest: Can I request a hotel that isn't listed on the platform?
faq.bookings.hotelRequestAnswer: Yes, if your preferred hotel is not listed, contact the team — it will be added to the system promptly.
faq.bookings.bookForOthers: Can I make a booking for another person?
faq.bookings.bookForOthersAnswer: Yes, the platform allows booking packages for other individuals.
faq.bookings.consultation: Can I get consultation on packages or hotels if I can't choose on my own?
faq.bookings.consultationAnswer: Of course! For any questions regarding hotels or packages, please contact 033 320050.
faq.payments.howToPay: How are payments made on MyTour?
faq.payments.howToPayAnswer: All payments on MyTour are made exclusively in a cashless form.
faq.payments.acceptedCards: Which cards can I use to pay for bookings
faq.payments.acceptedCardsAnswer: You can pay with any card issued by Armenian banks, except MIR and American Express.
faq.payments.installment: Can I make bookings with an installment plan?
faq.payments.installmentAnswer: Not at the moment, but this option will be available very soon.
faq.payments.withoutPrepayment: Can I book without a prepayment?
faq.payments.withoutPrepaymentAnswer: For bookings to Egypt, the UAE, and Cyprus with departure dates more than 40 days away, you can book without prepayment and make your first payment (50% of the package price) at least 35 days before departure. The second payment must be made at least 10 days before the flight.
faq.payments.cancellationAnswer: Cancellation policies depend on the destination and the partner operator. Each package or hotel has its own cancellation terms displayed on its individual offer page.
faq.partnership.whichAgencies: Which agencies do you cooperate with?
faq.partnership.whichAgenciesAnswer: MyTour features direct offers from operators and collaborates with Sky Tour, Maratuk, Anriva, Adventures, and Erebuni Air. The list of partners is constantly growing.
faq.partnership.howToPartner: How can I become a partner?
faq.partnership.howToPartnerAnswer: To become a partner, send your company name, your full name, and phone number to bookings@mytour.am. Our team will contact you shortly.
